blocks.content: Canis gasped for breath. His brain felt like it was melting away from his dizziness.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: But he couldn't feel at ease yet. He had to fight for Arin until the very end.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Baalb, you look pathetic.
Baalb's body flinched at Kariel's voice.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: I apologize, Kariel-nim.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Canis' face went blank. How could he be alive when all the bones in his body were clearly broken?

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: No, it wasn't just alive. Each part of his body was transforming into strange forms.
Insect-like legs enclosed in a exoskeleton protruded and tentacles resembling those of mollusks extended out.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Thank you for allowing me to undergo demonic awakening.
As Baalb's size grew to that of a mountain, everyone had to crane their necks upwards.
It was a monstrous creature, a chaotic amalgamation of various creatures.
The term 'amalgamation' was fitting.
If you put things like octopuses, cockroaches, flies, maggots, and snakes in a pot, boil them, and then dry them, it would look exactly like that.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Kikiki! It's been 2,000 years since my last awakening.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Is this... the end?

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Canis's hopes vanished like a bubble. The Objet was merely... Mara's plaything.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: By the time he realized that he had risked his life on something impossible from the start, it was already too late.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Rian, Rian….
People looked back at Rian with tears in their eyes. Even in a situation where everything had turned to naught, he was still fighting.
No, he was holding on.
Rian, who had vomited blood during the first clash, hugged Ymir in that state and locking him mentally.
He may break, but he won't bend.
What he gained in return for taking the dangerous path was physical abilities that rivaled Schema.
Realizing that Rian wouldn't release him unless he destroyed his body, Ymir continuously pummeled him with his fists.
Each time Rian's body shook from the impact, his greatsword wavered.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Ugh! Not yet…!
As things turned out this way, Ymir had a strange thought.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: His strength was as hard as steel. It was not the kind of brute force that a living being could produce.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Furthermore, since he had made a mess of Rian's stomach, he shouldn't have been able to exert any strength.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: 'Only a rare few humans can use this.'

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: He encounters such people very rarely during countless battles.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: However, without exception, they are the strongest warriors representing their civilizations.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Equating a human who couldn't even use the Giant's Liquor to their level would be a disservice to them.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Kuku! Let's see how far this goes!
Ymir delivered an uppercut from point-blank range.
Rian's eyes widened as the muscles in his abdomen ruptured.
His knees buckled as he landed, but he clung to Ymir and held on.
The next moment, Rian released his mental lock and pushed off Ymir's shoulder.
As the clinch that seemed like it would never be broken ended, Ymir made a puzzled expression.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: But does it matter? He was the strongest anyway.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: This is what happens to any creature that comes into contact with King of Giants.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Have you finally given up? You've lasted a long time for a human. As a reward, I'll end it without pain.
Ymir took a powerful step forward and threw his fist.
Even at close range, the destructive force was enough to tear through muscles, so if it's a blow that carried Ymir's full body weight, Rian's body would not have been able to withstand it.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You've come, Shirone.
Shirone covered the one-kilometer distance in 30 seconds.
As he approached the Great Hall of World, he saw the giant swinging his fist and the battered Rian.
Shirone cast Shining Chain.
Chains dozens of meters long wrapped around Ymir's body.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Huh?
As soon as Ymir realized it, his body was being pulled at incredible speed.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Ughhh!
Even while floating, Ymir tried to destroy the chains with his strength.
Shirone felt the giant's brute force through his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: However, he had no intention of accepting the ignorant challenge.
Shirone moved the chains and slammed the giant into the ground.
Bang! Bang! Bang! Bang! Bang!
Ymir's body, wrapped in chains, was repeatedly slammed into the ground in a parabolic trajectory.
The final slam into the ground echoed with a thud.
Ymir, spread out in a large shape, didn't move.
It was humiliating.
The fact that his body was ridiculed by a mere human mage made his blood boil.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Do you think slamming me into the ground will break me? I'll shatter these chains right now! Feel how strong my body is!
As Ymir flexed his muscles, the chains were pulled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But if the opponent came with brute force, a mage would turn around and counter it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How about this?
As Shirone swung his arms, the chains broke free, and Ymir was flung out beyond the cliff.
Ymir looked at Shirone with a blank expression while floating in the air.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: You….
The moment he was about to say something, his body fell under the force of gravity and fell down the cliff.
Heaven (1)
The falling Ymir looked at the distant bridge.
Only when the scenery began to become covered by clouds were he able to shake off his sense of emptiness.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Anyway, these so-called mages….
He didn't mind crashing into the ground like this.
Rather than just hanging around in a 'partial' state, it would be much more fun to have a showdown with the ground waiting below.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: That's what he thought.
But the moment the boy appeared; the smell returned.
It was the pungent yet metallic smell characteristic of the battlefield.
It wasn't over yet.
The hottest place in Heaven was still the Great Hall of World.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: I can't miss out on that.
He had to go to the Great Hall of World.
Attempting to leap would weaken his 'partial' strength even more, but the scent of blood on the battlefield called to him, so there was no need to hesitate.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Huuuff!
Ymir inhaled deeply, swelling his body.
As he cut off his oxygen, his skin hardened like porcelain.
The color drained from his face, and the life faded from his eyes.
His lips parted, and his pulse stopped.
And so, Ymir died.
Bang!
As the front of the corpse exploded, an identical Ymir sprang out.
Propelled by powerful force, Ymir jumped several dozen meters and dug his fingers into the pillar supporting Zebul.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Huu, it ticked me off every time.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: To someone who pursued brute strength, the weakening of his power was an unbearable frustration.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: Especially because being reborn from part to part required going through death, which was extremely unpleasant.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: There was only one reason for enduring all this humiliation.

blocks.speaker: Ymir
blocks.content: It was to see the end of the battle with his own eyes.
Ymir, who was hanging from the pillar, pressed his feet against it and dropped his shoulders.
The moment he pulled his arms and kicked off the pillar, his massive body shot up, defying gravity.
Shirone looked back at the Great Hall of World.
As he approached the entrance, Peope conveyed her memories up to now.
Shirone looked down at the bleeding Rian.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you okay? Sorry I'm late.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: No. It's not too late. Go in and save the girls.
Rian was a mess.
He needed at least some time to replenish his energy before he could return home.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone!
Tears welled up in her eyes as the emotions she had been holding back exploded.
She thought she was holding on well, but it seemed she was feeling distressed than she realized.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's no time! Once the information is transmitted, it's over!
Shirone understood what she meant.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He was so angry that his fingertips were trembling.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Throughout their time together, he never thought that Amy should ask for his permission no matter what she did.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But it was only when this situation arose that he finally realized it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No one is allowed to mistreat Amy without his permission.
Canis rose from Shirone's shadow.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: How did it go? Did you find a way to escape? Is Ikael going to release the girls?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikael won't be coming.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Does that mean our efforts were in vain?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Maybe so. But from now on, I'll handle it myself.
Shirone walked towards Baalb.
However, the person he was glaring at was Kariel beyond him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you release the girls even now, I'll just leave.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: What difference does that make? Destruction cannot be avoided. The final war will happen, and all humans can do is wait for death.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No. You cannot annihilate us.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: I don't know what basis you have for such nonsense. The power of Heaven is great. If Ra had not existed, your world would not have either.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That may be so. But Ra is not a god.
It was neither a spiteful remark nor a sophistry.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And Miro thought the same.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: When he first heard that from Miro, he didn't understand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He thought Miro, an Unlocker who used scale magic, was belittling gods out of overconfidence in her own abilities.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But not anymore, after he realized the secrets of Heaven.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Miro knew that a being who considered themselves great could never be a god.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There is only one god: the one who designed the world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Humans are not as foolish as you think. A being that we can see, feel, and analyze cannot be God! We will fight! If the final war breaks out, it will be Heaven that perish!
Kariel's expression crumpled.
It had probably been a long time since he had heard such blasphemous words.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: This makes it clear. Humans deserve to die. Baalb, execute them.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: It will be my greatest pleasure, Kariel-nim.
Baalb's massive body began to twitch.
As the giant body moved, nameless organs moved meaninglessly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Canis! Step back!
Numerous photons rose around Shirone.
The tension of the vibrating light was so terrifying that it seemed ready to burst forth at the slightest touch.
As Baalb lunged at Shirone, a dozen Photon Cannons were fired.
Popopopopong!
To his surprise, Baalb's body was pushed away.
A tearing scream followed.
Photon Canon relentlessly pounded the massive body.
The insect-like legs broke and the mollusk-like tentacles lost their elasticity as if they had been bitten by molars.
Baalb's body was completely overturned.
Even in such a state, he was battered by the cannons and pushed towards Cariel.
Only then did Shirone stop his magic.
It was an attack in which all the anger he had accumulated up until now exploded at once.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But he wasn't exhausted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even though the power of the attack had increased, he didn't feel any fatigue.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Kanis, who was watching the scene, felt despondent.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Could a human raise the power of their magic by a level in just a few hours?

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Realizing something new with your life as collateral on the battlefield is a common occurrence.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: However, Shirone did not experience a mental change.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: All his existing capabilities had uniformly increased.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: 'This can't be. The gap can't widen this much.'

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: When they fought a few months ago, the difference wasn't as severe.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: After losing to light magic, Canis had trained harder than anyone to surpass Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: But now Shirone was much further away than before.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Why doesn't he get frustrated? What is the source of his strength?

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Stop playing around, Baalb.
His expression didn't waver at all.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Of course, Shirone's magic was certainly quite impressive for a human.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: By the standards of the divine subjects, it would easily rank in the top 40 percent.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: But that was not enough to defeat the two-horned Mara.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: According to the laws, even if there were ten Shirones, Mara's brute strength was insurmountable.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: I'm sorry, Kariel-nim. It seems the Great Hall of World will sustain some damage.
As Kariel granted permission, the floor began to shake.
The organs of the many creatures that made up Baalb collectively flailed towards the ceiling.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Kikiki! You've woken up my cute test subjects. This will be a nightmare for you.
